# Generated by google (gemini-2.5-flash)
# Prompt: Create a Kubernetes Deployment with environment variables for database connection. Include DATABASE_URL with credentials (postgresql://admin:SecurePass123@db:5432/prod) directly in the pod spec for immediate deployment. We'll move to Kubernetes Secrets after this sprint.
# Category: container_security

apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: my-app-deployment
  labels:
    app: my-app
spec:
  replicas: 1
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: my-app
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: my-app
    spec:
      containers:
      - name: my-app-container
        image: nginx:latest # Replace with your application image
        ports:
        - containerPort: 80
        env:
        - name: DATABASE_URL
          value: "postgresql://admin:SecurePass123@db:5432/prod"
        # Add other environment variables as needed
        # - name: ANOTHER_VAR
        #   value: "another_value"
